input.text: TrellisAI turns daily farm notes into operational memory and a clear plan for tomorrow. A farmer starts with a messy field log: yellowing corn, irrigation, pests, labor, weather, or equipment delays. Gemini extracts structured activities, observations, risk signals, and embedding text. MongoDB stores the raw log, field history, recommendations, tasks, and vector-ready memory in one place. When the grower asks what should I do tomorrow, the agent queries MongoDB history, aggregates current risk signals, and returns prioritized field-specific recommendations. The public app runs on Cloudflare Workers, the backend runs on Google Cloud Run, and the agent story uses MongoDB MCP as the farm-memory tool layer.
